bonuses.stat: When you deal Critical Damage, you or an ally can activate the Gryphon's Reprisal on the enemy within the next 8 seconds, causing a small gryphon to fly by and deal 4758 Bleed damage over 10 seconds to enemies within 5 meters. This effect can occur once every 20 seconds and scales off the higher of the synergy activator's Weapon or Spell Damage.
